parameters.content:
## APMG - Enquiry Notification

**Trigger:** the app POSTs a landed portal enquiry here (app/api/portal/inquiries), so you get emailed when someone submits the services-portal form.

**Setup (once):**
1. Open **Send Notification** and select your Gmail (OAuth2) credential.
2. (Recommended) Send Webhook node > Authentication > Header Auth (header `x-apmg-secret`), and set the same value as `N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET` in the app env.
3. Activate, copy the **Production URL**, and paste it on the app's Integrations tab > Enquiry Notification card. Set the notification email there too.

**Request body:** `{ notifyTo, enquiry: { id, service, name, email, phone, message, business, category, campaign } }`
**Response:** `{ ok: true }`

The email is SENT to `notifyTo` (your configured address); the customer's email is shown in the body with a one-click Reply button.
